name: Crumb-Top Brown Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CRUMB TOPPING-------------------------------
2 tablespoons Brown sugar
2 tablespoons Sugar
1/8 teaspoon Nutmeg
1/8 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/8 teaspoon Salt
3 tablespoons Flour
2 tablespoons Margarine
Combine first 7 ingredients; toss to mix thoroughly. Heap in pie shell.
Combine topping ingredients and mix until crumbly; sprinkle over pie. Bake at 425°F for 45 minutes. Allow to cool 30 minutes before serving.
